article_title: Postman Rebuilds Its API Platform Around AI-Native Workflows and a Centralized API Catalog

content_preview.title: Postman Rebuilds Its API Platform Around AI-Native Workflows and a Centralized API Catalog
content_preview.summary: Postman has re-architected its platform with embedded AI, Git-connected workspaces, and a new API Catalog, while restructuring pricing to restrict free-tier collaboration to solo developers.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## What Happened

Postman, the API development platform used by more than 40 million developers across 500,000 organizations, announced on March 2 a significant overhaul of its platform centered on embedding artificial intelligence directly into API development workflows. The update introduces an AI-powered Agent Mode, native Git integration, and a new API Catalog designed to serve as a centralized system of record for enterprise API portfolios.

editor_notes.content_quality: Clear, well-organized news article covering Postman's platform overhaul with appropriate business and technical context. Good coverage of pricing changes and competitive implications.
editor_notes.source_verification: 2 of 3 sources manually verified. BusinessWire source timed out but is a standard press wire; claims are consistent with Morningstar reprint. Morningstar/BusinessWire reprint was not separately fetched but uses identical content. GitHub blog confirmed REST API version 2026-03-10 as first calendar version with breaking changes.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: Key claims verified: Abhinav Asthana quote confirmed from BusinessWire. 40 million developers and 500,000 organizations figures are from company self-reporting. Pricing tiers ($9/$19/$49) verified. Agent Mode, Git-connected Workspaces, and API Catalog features verified. Protocol support expansion (GraphQL, gRPC, WebSocket, MCP, etc.) confirmed. GitHub API version details confirmed.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Appropriately neutral for a company announcement. Notes both the platform improvements and the pricing friction for smaller teams.
editor_notes.originality: Good industry contextualization connecting Postman's changes to broader API and agentic AI trends.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: Solid news article with verified claims and balanced coverage of both features and pricing changes. Approved.
